title: Senior Financial Analyst - BSR & Co - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - BSR & Co - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
BSR & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSR & Co:
BSR & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co!
